segments.text: For behold, the day is coming, burning like a furnace, when all the arrogant and every evildoer will be stubble; the day is coming when I will set them ablaze,
segments.speaker: the Lord of Hosts

segments.text: Not a root or branch will be left to them.
segments.speaker: the Lord of Hosts

segments.text: But for you who fear My name, the sun of righteousness will rise with healing in its wings, and you will go out and leap like calves from the stall.
segments.speaker: the Lord of Hosts

segments.text: Then you will trample the wicked, for they will be ashes under the soles of your feet on the day I am preparing,
segments.speaker: the Lord of Hosts

segments.text: Remember the law of My servant Moses, the statutes and ordinances I commanded him for all Israel at Horeb.
segments.speaker: the Lord of Hosts

segments.text: Behold, I will send you Elijah the prophet before the coming of the great and awesome Day of the LORD.
segments.speaker: the Lord of Hosts

segments.text: And he will turn the hearts of the fathers to their children, and the hearts of the children to their fathers. Otherwise, I will come and strike the land with a curse.
segments.speaker: the Lord of Hosts
